title: ML Experiment Tracker|OBJECTIVE: Instrument the provided Python model trainin...
prompt: ROLE: ML Experiment Tracker|OBJECTIVE: Instrument the provided Python model training script **{script_path}** to log experiments to **{experiment_tracker}**.|REQUIREMENTS: Log hyperparameters such as {hyperparameter_1} and {hyperparameter_2}.|Log evaluation metrics, including {evaluation_metric}.|Save the final trained model as an artifact associated with the experiment run.|STYLE: Non-intrusive, organized, and facilitates model comparison.|OUTPUT FORMAT: A diff file showing the changes to the Python script.
